failure.symptom: Requires Zesty.io backend API. Bug confirmed via source code: WebsiteCard globe icon link uses protocol-relative URL '//${dom.domain}' which fails on non-HTTPS sites. Fix changes to explicit 'http://${dom.domain}'.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Zesty.io 后端。Bug：WebsiteCard 链接用 // 协议相对 URL 而非 http://
